item.title: VAC Truck Recovery Operation
item.description: A VAC truck gets stuck, and the recovery process begins with towing and heavy equipment support. The focus is on real-world vehicle rescue and field recovery work. What equipment would you use here?

media:content.media:title: VAC Truck Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: A VAC truck gets stuck, and the recovery process begins with towing and heavy equipment support. The focus is on real-world vehicle rescue and field recovery work. What equipment would you use here?

item.title: GPS Leads a Recovery Truck into the Mud
item.description: A recovery truck follows GPS directions that lead into a muddy obstacle, creating an unexpected recovery challenge of its own. The video highlights the problem-solving and equipment needed to get moving again. Have you ever been led astray by GPS?

media:content.media:title: GPS Leads a Recovery Truck into the Mud
media:content.media:description: A recovery truck follows GPS directions that lead into a muddy obstacle, creating an unexpected recovery challenge of its own. The video highlights the problem-solving and equipment needed to get moving again. Have you ever been led astray by GPS?

item.title: Chevy High Country Hits a New Low
item.description: A Chevrolet High Country finds itself in an unexpected predicament, requiring a recovery to get back on the road. The video follows the challenges, equipment, and teamwork involved in the operation. What would you have done in this situation?

media:content.media:title: Chevy High Country Hits a New Low
media:content.media:description: A Chevrolet High Country finds itself in an unexpected predicament, requiring a recovery to get back on the road. The video follows the challenges, equipment, and teamwork involved in the operation. What would you have done in this situation?

item.title: Hazmat Tanker Rollover Recovery
item.description: A loaded hazmat tanker rollover requires careful recovery planning, specialized equipment, and controlled operations to secure the scene and move the vehicle safely. What steps are needed first?

media:content.media:title: Hazmat Tanker Rollover Recovery
media:content.media:description: A loaded hazmat tanker rollover requires careful recovery planning, specialized equipment, and controlled operations to secure the scene and move the vehicle safely. What steps are needed first?

item.title: Heavy Recovery Under Time Pressure
item.description: A heavy recovery operation unfolds under tight time constraints as the crew works quickly to clear the roadway. The video highlights teamwork, specialized equipment, and efficient problem-solving. How do you think crews prepare for time-critical recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Recovery Under Time Pressure
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation unfolds under tight time constraints as the crew works quickly to clear the roadway. The video highlights teamwork, specialized equipment, and efficient problem-solving. How do you think crews prepare for time-critical recoveries?

item.title: Cleaning Up a Burnt Car on the Interstate
item.description: A recovery team removes a burned vehicle from the interstate and clears the scene for traffic to resume safely. The video follows the cleanup process from start to finish. What recovery job would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Cleaning Up a Burnt Car on the Interstate
media:content.media:description: A recovery team removes a burned vehicle from the interstate and clears the scene for traffic to resume safely. The video follows the cleanup process from start to finish. What recovery job would you like to see next?

item.title: Dual Car Towing on CR-250
item.description: A towing crew handles two vehicles in a single recovery operation along County Road 250. The video demonstrates efficient planning and safe towing techniques. Which towing setup do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: Dual Car Towing on CR-250
media:content.media:description: A towing crew handles two vehicles in a single recovery operation along County Road 250. The video demonstrates efficient planning and safe towing techniques. Which towing setup do you find most interesting?

item.title: Rotator vs. Rogator
item.description: A heavy-duty rotator is called in to recover a Rogator agricultural vehicle from a difficult situation. The video showcases the planning and equipment needed for a safe recovery. Have you ever seen a recovery like this before?

media:content.media:title: Rotator vs. Rogator
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty rotator is called in to recover a Rogator agricultural vehicle from a difficult situation. The video showcases the planning and equipment needed for a safe recovery. Have you ever seen a recovery like this before?

item.title: Box Truck Crash Recovery and Cleanup
item.description: A recovery crew clears a crashed box truck and removes debris to reopen the roadway. The video highlights the equipment, coordination, and cleanup required after a serious incident. What part of the recovery process interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Box Truck Crash Recovery and Cleanup
media:content.media:description: A recovery crew clears a crashed box truck and removes debris to reopen the roadway. The video highlights the equipment, coordination, and cleanup required after a serious incident. What part of the recovery process interests you most?

item.title: Caught in a Bind? Heavy Recovery at Work
item.description: A heavy recovery team responds to a challenging vehicle recovery, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the job safely. What recovery technique do you find most impressive?

media:content.media:title: Caught in a Bind? Heavy Recovery at Work
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery team responds to a challenging vehicle recovery, using specialized equipment and careful planning to complete the job safely. What recovery technique do you find most impressive?

item.title: Grain Truck Tips Over Blocking Road
item.description: A grain truck overturns and blocks the roadway, prompting a carefully planned recovery operation. The video follows the team's efforts to clear the scene and reopen the road safely. What aspect of heavy recovery work stands out to you?

media:content.media:title: Grain Truck Tips Over Blocking Road
media:content.media:description: A grain truck overturns and blocks the roadway, prompting a carefully planned recovery operation. The video follows the team's efforts to clear the scene and reopen the road safely. What aspect of heavy recovery work stands out to you?

item.title: Forklifts and Fords: Two Recovery Jobs at Once
item.description: A busy day has the recovery team handling both a forklift and a Ford vehicle at the same time. The video highlights coordination, problem-solving, and efficient recovery operations. Which recovery would you tackle first?

media:content.media:title: Forklifts and Fords: Two Recovery Jobs at Once
media:content.media:description: A busy day has the recovery team handling both a forklift and a Ford vehicle at the same time. The video highlights coordination, problem-solving, and efficient recovery operations. Which recovery would you tackle first?

item.title: How Would You Like Your Ford?
item.description: A unique Ford recovery job presents unexpected challenges for the recovery team. The video follows the planning and execution needed to safely move the vehicle. What type of recovery do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: How Would You Like Your Ford?
media:content.media:description: A unique Ford recovery job presents unexpected challenges for the recovery team. The video follows the planning and execution needed to safely move the vehicle. What type of recovery do you find most interesting?
